THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO OFFICE OF THE TREASURER & TAX COLLECTOR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HILL, JOEL $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $25.87 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,025.87, DEFT FAILED TO APPEAR. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
